org.hibernate.SQL : create table categories (created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null unique, category_code varchar(64), description varchar(255), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.825+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table expenses (amount float(53) not null, expense_date date not null, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, category varchar(255), description varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.830+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table job_applications (created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), phone varchar(15) not null, id uuid not null, job_posting_id uuid, position varchar(50) not null, tracking_code varchar(50) unique, email varchar(100) not null, full_name varchar(100) not null, cv_url varchar(500), status varchar(255) check (status in ('NEW','REVIEWED','INTERVIEWING','REJECTED','HIRED')), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.831+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table job_postings (is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('FULL_TIME','PART_TIME','INTERNSHIP')), location varchar(100) not null, title varchar(100) not null, description TEXT, requirements TEXT, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.831+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table order_items (quantity integer, snapshot_unit_price numeric(12,2), sub_total numeric(12,2), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, order_id uuid, product_id uuid, snapshot_product_name varchar(255), snapshot_options json, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.833+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table orders (discount_amount numeric(12,2), grand_total numeric(12,2), sub_total numeric(12,2), total_amount float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), address_id uuid, id uuid not null, promotion_id uuid, user_id uuid, order_status varchar(50), payment_method varchar(50), payment_status varchar(50), address_text TEXT, customer_name varchar(255), note TEXT, order_type varchar(255), phone varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','SHIPPING','COMPLETED','CANCELLED')), tracking_code varchar(255) unique, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.833+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table product_reviews (rating_score integer, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, product_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, review_text TEXT, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.835+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table product_sizes (price float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, product_id uuid, size_name varchar(255), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table products (avg_rating numeric(3,2), base_price numeric(10,2), is_available boolean, review_count integer, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), category_id uuid, id uuid not null, product_code varchar(96), name varchar(100) not null unique, image varchar(500), description TEXT, tags TEXT, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table promotions (discount_value numeric(12,2), min_order_value numeric(12,2), created_at timestamp(6), end_date timestamp(6), start_date timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, discount_type varchar(50), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table toppings (price float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table user_addresses (is_default boolean, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, address_line varchar(500), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users (active boolean not null, hourly_rate float(53), created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), phone varchar(15), id uuid not null, user_code varchar(20) unique, username varchar(50) not null unique, email varchar(100), full_name varchar(100), password varchar(100) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','STAFF','USER')), primary key (id)) 2026-05-01T03:12:50.837+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists job_applications add constraint FKfjwyy10f2yywhxflbf9trb6nb foreign key (job_posting_id) references job_postings 2026-05-01T03:12:50.843+07:00 DEBUG 14148 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table
